sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11764" key="a)peirotexnh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπειρο-τεχνής</orth>, <sense id="n11764.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f. l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-λεχής</ref> </xr> in Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:4:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
